title: Run LilyGO end-to-end packet and app smoke tests
description: Why this exists: LilyGO should prove the target is usable, not just bootable. What needs to be done: run a small end-to-end smoke suite covering LoRa packet TX/RX or known-peer exchange, node status, local client connection, basic message send/receive through native interface where available, and diagnostics collection. Acceptance criteria: test steps and outputs are recorded; at least one real packet path is verified; at least one local app path is verified; failures are split into blocker/follow-up Beads; results are sufficient for contributor handoff.
